calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michael Heath, Esq. appeared for plaintiff OK Investments, Inc.
Homie Naimi, President of OK Investments, Inc., was placed under of and examined.
No appearance by defendants Patient to Patient, LLC, or Kenneth Estes.
Defaults were entered against defendants on March 20, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed March 20, 2010.
Clerk's Judgment for Possession was entered on March 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff OK Investments, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendants Patient to Patient, LLC, and Kenneth Estes as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $15,348.00.
Holdover Damages - $11,440.00.
Attorneys Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $605.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $30,218.00.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 2151 Lombard Street, San Francisco, CA 94123. The Lease is forfeited.

Amended Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
